entry.title: Deodorant Cosmébio Without Aluminum Salts Without Alcohol Without Parabens 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: FUN!ETHIC
Type: Deodorant
Price: 6.90

The natural and certified organic “Avoir 20 Ans” alcohol-free roll-on deodorant has been tested effective for 24 hours. It is also free of aluminum salts and parabens. The aloe vera contained in the treatment makes it very moisturizing, it is ideal after hair removal to avoid redness. Its antibacterial active ingredients prevent appearance of post-depilatory pimples. Its small ball allows it to be applied precisely and it does not stain clothes. 

It is suitable for all skin types. Its creamy texture and very light 100% natural orange blossom fragrance will delight you every day.

How to use: The “Avoir 20 Ans” deodorant is used in the morning and/or evening after a shower on clean, dry skin, applying gently under the armpits. Repeat the application during the day when you feel the need.

Ingredients: Aqua, hordeum vulgare stem water*, caprylic/capric triglycerides, triethyl citrate, cetearyl alcohol, glyceryl stearate, glycerin, stearic acid, prunus persica juice, aloe vera barbadensis powder*, tocopherol, helianthus annuus seed oil, salvia officinalis (sage) oil , sodium caproyl/lauroyl lactyl lactate, sodium lauroyl glutamate, xanthan gum, citric acid, sodium benzoate, potassium sorbate, benzyl alcohol, dehydroacetic acid, fragrance, linalool, limonene, geraniol, citral.

* Ingredient from Organic Farming
** Processed from ingredients from Organic Farming

Made in France.

  • 99.5% natural ingredients, 12.9% from organic farming and mainly from fair trade
  • All raw materials processed in France
  • Deodorant made in France (Alsace)
  • No controversial ingredients, 100% good for your skin and the enivironment
  • Total absence of palm oil and its derivatives
  • Packaging: 100% recycled and recyclable bottle made in Europe

entry.title: Cosmos Organic Certified Extra Gentle Shower Gel - Refreshing Tonic Scent 250ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: FUN!ETHIC
Type: Body Wash
Price: 6.50

Extra gentle and certified organic natural shower gel with an invigorating and refreshing 100% natural lemon verbena scent. Enriched with natural glycerin, it gently cleanses and moisturizes the skin.  

Its exemplary formula is respectful of your skin and the environment: without sulfates, parabens, PEG, phenoxyethanol or cocamidopropyl betaine. Its creamy texture, delicate foam and fresh lemon verbana scent create a real moment of relaxation in your shower. 

The shower gel is suitable for all skin types and will be appreciated by the whole family. Children under 3 years old are not recommended to use this shower gel.

How to use: Lemon verbena shower gel can be used daily on the face and body. Apply the shower gel on the body, avoid the eye area. Rinse and dry. 

Ingredients: Aqua (water), hordeum stem water*, lauryl glucoside, sodium cocoyl glutamate, glycerin, coco glucoside, citric acid, glyceryl oleate, parfum (fragrance), citral, limonene, sodium benzoate, potassium sorbate.

* Ingredient from Organic Farming
** Processed from ingredients from Organic Farming

Made in France.

  • Ingredients 99.5% natural and 10.5% from organic farming
  • All raw materials processed in France
  • Shower gel made in France (Alsace)
  • No controversial ingredients, 100% good for your skin
  • Without palm oil or derivatives
  • Does not release pollutants into water
  • Packaging: 100% recycled and recyclable bottles made in Europe

entry.title: Cosmos Organic Certified Extra Gentle Shower Gel - Discreet Saline Scent 250ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: FUN!ETHIC
Type: Body Wash
Price: 6.50

Extra gentle and certified organic natural shower gel with a discreet marine and saline scent. Enriched with natural glycerin, it gently cleanses and moisturizes the skin.  

Its exemplary formula is respectful of your skin and the environment: without sulfates, parabens, PEG, phenoxyethanol or cocamidopropyl betaine. Its creamy texture, delicate foam and fresh lemon verbana scent create a real moment of relaxation in your shower.

The shower gel is suitable for all skin types and will be appreciated by the whole family. Children under 3 years old are not recommended to use this shower gel.

How to use: Marine shower gel can be used daily on the face and body. Apply the shower gel on the body, avoid the eye area. Rinse and dry.

Ingredients: Aqua (water), hordeum stem water*, lauryl glucoside, sodium cocoyl glutamate, glycerin, coco glucoside, citric acid, glyceryl oleate, parfum (fragrance), benzyl salicylate, geraniol, sodium benzoate, potassium sorbate.

* Ingredient from Organic Farming
** Processed from ingredients from Organic Farming

Made in France.

  • Ingredients 99.5% natural and 10.5% from organic farming
  • All raw materials processed in France
  • Shower gel made in France (Alsace)
  • No controversial ingredients, 100% good for your skin
  • Without palm oil or derivatives
  • Does not release pollutants into water
  • Packaging:  100% recycled and recyclable bottle made in Europe

entry.title: Cosmos Organic Certified Extra Gentle Shower Gel - Fruity Wild Strawberry 250ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: FUN!ETHIC
Type: Body Wash
Price: 6.50

Extra gentle and certified organic natural shower gel with a delicious and fruity 100% natural wild strawberry scent. Enriched with natural glycerin, it gently cleanses and moisturizes the skin.

Its exemplary formula is respectful of your skin and the environment: without sulfates, parabens, PEG, phenoxyethanol or cocamidopropyl betaine. Its creamy texture, delicate foam and fresh lemon verbana scent create a real moment of relaxation in your shower.

The shower gel is suitable for all skin types and will be appreciated by the whole family. Children under 3 years old are not recommended to use this shower gel.

How to use: Wild strawberry shower gel can be used daily on the face and body. Apply the shower gel on the body, avoid the eye area. Rinse and dry. 

Ingredients: Aqua (water), hordeum stem water*, lauryl glucoside, sodium cocoyl glutamate, glycerin, coco glucoside, citric acid, glyceryl oleate, parfum (fragrance), sodium benzoate, potassium sorbate.

* Ingredient from Organic Farming
** Processed from ingredients from Organic Farming

Made in France.

  • Ingredients 99.5% natural and 10.5% from organic farming
  • All raw materials processed in France
  • Shower gel made in France (Alsace)
  • No controversial ingredients , 100% good for your skin
  • Without palm oil or derivatives
  • Does not release pollutants into water
  • Packaging: 100% recycled and recyclable bottle made in Europe
